# BP-116 negative variant: a non-Echo context with the same JSON method is ignored.
lang: go
file: BP-116-variant-safe.go
variant: non-echo
---
package sample

import "net/http"

type Context struct{}

func (Context) json(int, any) error { return nil }

func remove(c Context) error {
	if err := removeRecord(); err != nil {
		if responseErr := c.json(http.StatusNotFound, map[string]string{"error": "missing"}); responseErr != nil {
			return responseErr
		}
		return nil
	}
	return nil
}

func removeRecord() error { return nil }
